title: Ubiquiti UISP-Box, UISP weatherproof enclosure for routers and switches
description: Very compact outdoor box from Ubiquiti with IPX6 coverage is intended for wall or mast (35 to 60mm) and is specially made for router (UISP-R) or switch (UISP-S). The box is adapted in such a way that it is enough to place the router and connect the UISP power TransPort cable (sold separately) or to the existing power adapter
